fields.summary: Specifies arguments for creating or cloning a typeface with specific font variation settings and palette overrides.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontArguments` is a `ref struct` that holds font configuration options passed to <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.Clone(SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments)>. Use it to specify a variation design position, a color palette index, and individual palette color overrides.

Because this is a `ref struct`, it cannot be boxed or stored on the heap.

## Examples

```csharp
var args = new SKFontArguments
{
    CollectionIndex = 0,
    PaletteIndex = 0,
};
using var cloned = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the index of the desired font within a font collection.
fields.value: The zero-based index of the font within the collection.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the index of the color palette to use for the font.
fields.value: The zero-based index of the color palette.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the color overrides applied to specific entries in the selected palette.
fields.value: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> values specifying which palette entries to override.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the variation design position coordinates for font variations.
fields.value: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values specifying the axis-value pairs for the variation design position.
